description.en: Adds to hero personal attack and defense in combat.
Increases attack of all troops in armies led by the hero.
Increases defense of all own troops in armies with the hero.
Boosts resource production in the hero home village.

tribes.name: Romans
tribes.theme: Elite troops, strong infantry and cavalry, expensive training

description.en: Travian Roman hero — +100 fighting strength per point (tribe bonus).

tribes.name: Teutons
tribes.theme: Aggressive infantry and heavy cavalry, strong raiders

tribes.name: Gauls
tribes.theme: Fast cavalry, solid defense, fastest scouts

tribes.name: Egyptians
tribes.theme: Strong defense, cheap militia, stone wall synergy

tribes.name: Huns
tribes.theme: Pure offense, fast cavalry, weak defense

description.en: Mounted hero — armies move faster with hero (tribe bonus).

tribes.name: Spartans
tribes.theme: Crop-efficient defense, infantry scout, elite late-game hammer

tribes.name: Natars
tribes.theme: NPC endgame tribe — guards artefacts and Wonder plans

description.en: NPC hero for Natar villages and WW defenses.

tribes.name: Nature
tribes.theme: Oasis animals — no upkeep, captured with hero cages

description.en: Not a playable hero — represents oasis guardian presence.
